events.text: Néstor Araújo (Mexico) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Gonzalo Montiel (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Érick Gutiérrez (Mexico) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Argentina 1, Mexico 0. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Ángel Di María.
Héctor Herrera (Mexico) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Argentina 2, Mexico 0. Enzo Fernández (Argentina) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Lionel Messi   following a corner.
Roberto Alvarado (Mexico) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
